race.description: Country Music Raceday 5 September Prov Mdn Hcp
race.comment: Impossible to go past IRONBLOOD EMPRESS (4) who finished the race off well and just missed the placings on debut over 1250m at the Kensington track last start. Very little quality in this race so despite being a two-year-old taking on older horses she should be too good. CAPE DOUGLAS (5) pushed hard from a wide gate to lead then couldn't do it at both ends when down the track over this course and distance last time out. Fitter for two runs back from a spell and draws a lot closer today. A danger if there is one. PRANKAJ (9) made a little late ground without threatening first-up over 1200m at Wyong. Can improve over this longer trip second-up. WARM FRONT (12) is back after a 20-week spell. Form when last in work was patchy. One for the wider exotics. SHARE THE JOY (11) is a 33-start maiden back from a five-month lay-off. Placed two from three when fresh so might be worth an each-way ticket.
